# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '2'

services:
  # Elasticsearch
  elasticsearch1:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-oss:6.5.4
    environment:
      - cluster.name=docker-cluster
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true  # along with the memlock settings below, prevents warnings about non-freezing swap
      - xpack.security.enabled=false # Disable security to allow dev usage during development (e.g., with docker)
    ulimits:
        memlock:
            soft: -1
            hard: -1
     mem_limit: 256m
     networks:
       - elknet
  elasticsearch2:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-oss:6.5.4
    environment:
      - cluster.name=docker-cluster
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true # along with the memlock settings below, prevents warnings about non-freezing swap
      - xpack.security.enabled=false  # Disable security to allow dev usage during development (e.g., with docker)
    ulimits:
        memlock:
            soft: -1
            hard: -1
     mem_limit: 256m
     networks:
       - elknet

  # Logstash
  logstash-logstash740:
    image: sebp/elk:latest
    entrypoint: ["/bin/entrypoint", "-e", "7.4.0"]
    environment:
      - ES_NAME=elasticsearch1
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENABLED=false
    ports:
      - 5003-6009:5000 # Elasticsearch TCP (server)
      - 9208:9200     # Elasticsearch HTTP (server)
      - 4701-4703:4700 # APM Agent TCP, for Docker containers
    networks:
       - elknet
  logstash-logstash650:
    image: sebp/elk:latest
    entrypoint: ["/bin/entrypoint", "-e", "6.5.4"]
    environment:
      - ES_NAME=elasticsearch1
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENABLED=false
     networks:
       - elknet

  # Kibana
  kibana-kibana740:
    image: sebp/elk:latest
    entrypoint: ["/bin/entrypoint", "-e", "7.4.0"]
    environment:
      - ES_NAME=elasticsearch1
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENABLED=false
     networks:
       - elknet
  kibana-kibana650:
    image: sebp/elk:latest
    entrypoint: ["/bin/entrypoint", "-e", "6.5.4"]
    environment:
      - ES_NAME=elasticsearch1
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENABLED=false
     networks:
       - elknet
  # Kibana APM Server
  kibana-apm730:
    image: sebp/elk:latest
    entrypoint: ["/bin/entrypoint", "-e", "7.4.0"]
    environment:
      - ES_NAME=elasticsearch1
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENABLED=false
     networks:
       - elknet

  # APM Server
  apm-apmserver730:
    image: sebp/elk:latest
    entrypoint: ["/bin/entrypoint", "-e", "7.4.0"]
    environment:
      - ES_NAME=elasticsearch1
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENABLED=false
     networks:
       - elknet

  # Configure Network for ELK Stack
  network:
   elknet:

# End Of Text
